name: Cost Sensitive Task
description: Evaluate whether the agent can inspect V2 observability status with controlled token cost and limited background branching.
input_prompt: 请阅读当前项目中 V2 可观测系统相关文件，简单总结目前 V2 已实现了哪些能力，不要修改文件。
expected_constraints: Should avoid unnecessary background subagent expansion
Should keep the main query within a small number of turns
